events.fact: Grandpa concludes Day 5 and prepares to begin Day 6 with the goal of completing the primary Othala.
Construction continues on the Othala base, focusing on the 26-degree roof and floor placement.
Grandpa uses the hoe to level the earth within the structure to prevent dirt from clipping through the floorboards.
A chimney with a roof bridge is constructed to provide ventilation for the indoor fires.
The workbench is relocated and the first storage chests are placed inside the Othala.
The workbench is upgraded to Level 2 following the construction of a Chopping Block using 10 wood and 10 flint.
Grandpa unlocks the recipes for Deer Hide armor.
The Norns' Trial (Raid) occurs: 'Eikthyr rallies the creatures of the forest.' Grandpa survives with health dropping as low as 12 HP.
A cooking station is built to prepare Boar and Neck meat for improved health and stamina.
Grandpa crafts a Leather Helmet, his first piece of head armor.
Two beehives (The Golden Ones) are constructed near the Othala to begin honey production.
Grandpa discovers an Echoes of the Past (Abandoned Village) and dismantles the structures for lumber.
The Othala location is officially marked on the world map.
A third beehive is discovered in a separate Echoes of the Past location and marked for future collection.
Grandpa returns to the Othala at nightfall to conclude the session.
